instruction: Retrieve total page views for March 2024. The current query filters with toMonth() which matches March in ANY year, not just 2024. Use a date-range filter that also enables MergeTree partition pruning on the toYYYYMM partition key.
broken_query: SELECT page, sum(views) AS total_views FROM chqr_tasks.t_page_views_df WHERE toMonth(event_date) = 3 GROUP BY page ORDER BY page
gold_query: SELECT page, sum(views) AS total_views FROM chqr_tasks.t_page_views_df WHERE toYYYYMM(event_date) = 202403 GROUP BY page ORDER BY page
simulated_error: Report includes March 2023 data mixed with March 2024; totals are inflated. toMonth() ignores the year component.
schema_hint: MergeTree partitioned by toYYYYMM(event_date). Columns: event_date Date, page String, views UInt32. Data spans 2023-03 through 2024-06.
setup_sql: CREATE DATABASE IF NOT EXISTS chqr_tasks; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS chqr_tasks.t_page_views_df; CREATE TABLE chqr_tasks.t_page_views_df (event_date Date, page String, views UInt32) ENGINE = MergeTree() PARTITION BY toYYYYMM(event_date) ORDER BY (page, event_date); INSERT INTO chqr_tasks.t_page_views_df VALUES ('2023-03-10', 'home', 500), ('2023-03-20', 'about', 120), ('2024-03-05', 'home', 800), ('2024-03-15', 'about', 200), ('2024-03-25', 'home', 300), ('2024-04-01', 'home', 150), ('2024-06-10', 'about', 90)
